sys_metadata_link.payload:
true text 89137fd0db4420106a58ef92ca961903 false false false false false 6a0e0e96db4d99501e1792c5d4961956 ddba8256db4d99501e1792c5d496195a The Role Members list displays users in the ServiceNow User Role list and their Tasker role. After you KB0010005 2022-08-09 Role Members Count kb_knowledge rjoy 2022-08-09 22:40:37 global / 5b29f95cdb1111901e1792c5d49619f5 4 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:31:41 20 The Role Members list displays users in the ServiceNow User Role list and their Tasker role. After you assign a user to a Tasker group, they display in this list. (After removing a user from a group, they are also removed from the Role Members list).

The number displayed in the button specifies the total unique users assigned the role. If a user is assigned a role multiple times, they will appear in the list more than once. In the example below, Allison was assigned the role directly and through inheritance.

Here's what you can see on this screen:

  • User displays the user name.
  • Role displays the Tasker Role for the user.
  • State indicates if the user record is Active or Inactive.
  • Inherited indicates if the Tasker role is inherited from another Tasker role. For example, users who are assigned the Global Template Designer role inherit the Personal Template Designer role. In this example, you must still add the user who inherited the Personal Template Designer role to the Personal Template Designer group.
  • Inheritance Count displays the total number of inherited Tasker roles for the user.
  • Context Menu: Select the content menu for options to view the User Role list in ServiceNow and options to export to PDF, Excel, and CSV.
]]> General 0 2100-01-01 published #f0edee 700000 true image/png Pasted image.png c16b59b74ed055cb107a45071d84c22627eb33252ecae0529b47f0d75e4dc82b 322 854 33609 31819 available csloyer 2022-09-22 15:30:57 9eccbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f9 3 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:30:57 kb_knowledge 5b29f95cdb1111901e1792c5d49619f5  22448 0 9eccbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f9 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:30:57 deccbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f9  19980 1 9eccbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f9 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:30:57 52ccbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619fa
